data.title: [brainstorm fidelity review]: orchestrator dispatches single sub-agent for all 3 review perspectives -> reviews not independent
data.description: During brainstorm for epic c804-9ccf, the orchestrator dispatched a single sub-agent to perform all 3 fidelity review perspectives (Agent Clarity, Scope, Value) simultaneously instead of dispatching 3 separate agents in parallel as specified by the scrutiny pipeline (epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md Step 4). This means the reviews are not independent — each perspective can see and be influenced by the others within the same agent context, defeating the purpose of multi-perspective review. Expected: 3 separate agents dispatched in parallel, each receiving only their reviewer prompt. Actual: 1 agent dispatched with all 3 reviewer prompts combined in a single prompt.
